## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] Commits are **signed off** (DCO): `git commit -s` adds the
      `Signed-off-by` trailer the `dco` check requires.
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`go test ./...` and, for UI changes, the frontend
      gate) and I added/updated tests for the change.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, flags, or APIs changed.
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or customer data in the diff.
